Markdown
---
title: "Photo Gallery"
lightbox: auto
---

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Define the folder
img_dir <- "Lightbox_Photos"

# Get file names
images <- list.files(img_dir, 
                     pattern = "\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif)$", 
                     full.names = TRUE, 
                     ignore.case = TRUE)

# Generate the image syntax
for (img in images) {
  cat(paste0("![ ](", img, "){group='my-gallery'}\n\n"))
}
```

:::
